privileged_info_summary: The AuPbSn40 image is a real, publicly-available sample image from the official ImageJ repository (imagej.net), not synthetic data. The image is 8-bit grayscale, 600x412 pixels, in JPEG format, dated January 2017. It authentically depicts a Au-Pb-Sn ternary eutectic alloy microstructure with two visually distinct phases: a brighter, fine-textured lamellar phase and darker, coarser-textured phase regions. The Au-Pb-Sn system is a well-documented metallurgical material system with a characterized ternary phase diagram. All metadata claims (image path, output directory, minimum 6 ROIs requirement, and list of required output files) match the task description exactly and are accurate.
